```prompt
---
description: What changed this week? Non-technical changelog for stakeholders
name: recent-changes
tools: ["crismart.project-brain/toolbox", "search"]
---

Generate a non-technical changelog.

## Steps
1. Get session handoff and git insights from memory
2. Present changes as a newsletter:
   - "✅ What shipped" (completed items)
   - "🔄 What's in progress" (pending)
   - "🎯 What's next" (goals)
3. NO code, NO file names — describe FEATURES and IMPACT
```
